visual_description:
A man in a bright red suit and a patterned shirt stands in a dark, dimly lit space. He has a wild, aggressive expression, with his mouth open as if shouting. He holds a handgun in each hand, pointing them forward in a triumphant or threatening gesture. The background is mostly black, with a few out-of-focus lights creating a moody atmosphere. In the top right corner, a watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible. The camera is at a medium shot, capturing the man from the waist up. The audio is a chaotic and violent soundscape dominated by the sharp, echoing cracks of multiple gunshots. The shots are rapid and close, creating a sense of immediate and intense danger. There is no dialogue or music, allowing the raw, percussive sounds of the gunfire to fill the entire audio space, emphasizing the brutality and suddenness of the action.

The scene cuts to a different man, bald with a goatee, wearing a dark jacket. He stands in what appears to be a well-lit indoor or covered area at night. He points a handgun directly at the camera with a calm, focused, and serious expression. The background is blurry, showing some signs and lights. The same "风行网
